name: Share a CLAUDE.md

labels: examples

## Project type

One or two words. Examples: "Next.js dashboard", "Shopify theme", "Telegram bot", "data cleaning script".

## Why this one is interesting

Two or three sentences. What does this CLAUDE.md do well? What did you wish you had known when you started?

## Your CLAUDE.md

Paste the file below. Strip anything personal first (name, company, email, paths that include your username, client names, API keys, internal URLs).

```markdown
(paste here)
```

## Want to open the PR yourself?

If you prefer to open a PR directly (faster merge), follow `CONTRIBUTING.md` and drop a note here when the PR is up.

- [ ] I stripped personal info from the file above.
- [ ] I checked that this category is not already in `examples/`.
